creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 220184
svn diff for misc/smssend: updates to 3.6; takes MAINTAINER

This pr(1) updates misc/smssend to 3.6.

Changelog (smssend):

- new web site
- massive re(work|write) of web pages
- rewrite documentation (internal && web)
- some error handling fixes
- weed out broken (user submitted) scripts -- ongoing
- bump version

port:

Makefile
distinfo
pkg-descr

While here; take MAINTAINERship


====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)

Works good.

NOTE: misc/smssend is maintained by ports@ so approval is implicit

Thanks!

--Chris
